name: print-job-intake
description: Morning print job intake automation for print shops. Sweeps Gmail for new orders, calculates promised dates from live queue depth, logs jobs to a Notion tracker, and drafts client confirmation replies.

skills.name: Morning Intake
skills.description: Sweeps Gmail via screen control, stars confirmed print job emails, calculates Promised date from queue depth, and logs each job to Notion.

skills.name: Gmail Intake
skills.description: API-based alternative to morning-intake. Same workflow but driven by Gmail MCP tools instead of screen control. Includes client reply drafting. Intended for handoff use cases where computer use is unavailable.

skills.name: Log Print Job
skills.description: Manually log a single print job from pasted email text or spoken specs. Works with any AI — falls back to formatted output if Notion MCP is unavailable.

configuration.description: On first use each skill checks memory for the following values. If any are missing it will ask before proceeding.

fields.label: Your name
fields.description: Used for email reply sign-offs and confirmation messages.

fields.label: Company / shop name
fields.description: Used in Notion client records and intake summaries.

fields.label: Gmail account address
fields.description: The inbox to sweep for print job emails.

fields.label: Notion Print Jobs database ID
fields.description: The Notion database where print job rows are created.

fields.label: Notion Clients database ID
fields.description: The Notion database used for client relation lookups.
